auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to continue your Cafa AI conversations.
auth.loginBlurb: Use your email or username and password to continue.

auth.termsNotice: By continuing, you agree to Cafa AI terms and privacy policy.
onboarding.slide1.title: What Is Cafa AI?
onboarding.slide1.body: Cafa AI is a mobile AI assistant for everyday work and life. You can use it for questions, writing, planning, and creative tasks from one chat. Instead of switching between apps and search results, you get a clear starting point in seconds.
onboarding.slide2.title: How It Works
onboarding.slide2.body: Cafa AI works like a conversation, not a traditional search engine. Type a question or describe what you need, and it responds in plain language. You can then ask it to summarize, rewrite, expand, or format the result for your exact use case.
onboarding.slide3.title: Everyday Quick Answers
onboarding.slide3.body: Use Cafa AI for fast, practical help throughout the day. Ask about general topics, compare options, or get help making plans. For example, you can create a travel budget draft and quickly adjust flights, food, and daily spending.
onboarding.slide4.title: Follow-Up Friendly
onboarding.slide4.body: You do not need to restart from scratch after each reply. Keep refining in the same conversation with follow-up prompts. Ask for a shorter version, a different tone, more detail, or a polished final draft you can send or publish.
onboarding.slide5.title: Chat Memory
onboarding.slide5.body: Cafa AI keeps context within each conversation to make multi-step tasks easier. It remembers what you were discussing so your follow-ups stay relevant. That helps when you are solving one task across multiple rounds or returning later.
onboarding.slide6.title: Images and Videos
onboarding.slide6.body: Beyond text, you can create visual content inside the app. Generate images for ideas, campaigns, or social posts, and create short video concepts quickly. It is a simple way to explore visuals without heavy editing software.
onboarding.slide7.title: Understand Documents
onboarding.slide7.body: Upload documents and ask direct questions about the content. Cafa AI can summarize key points, explain complex sections in simpler terms, and surface important details faster. This is useful for class notes, reports, proposals, and prep before meetings.
onboarding.slide8.title: Export Useful Outputs
onboarding.slide8.body: Turn raw information into practical outputs you can share. Cafa AI can help produce chart-ready summaries, PDF-style notes, spreadsheet structures, and presentation outlines. It is useful for school projects, business updates, and personal planning.
onboarding.slide9.title: Real-Time Help
onboarding.slide9.body: Cafa AI can also help with timely information when topics change quickly. Use it for weather checks, quick updates, and live-context questions. For high-stakes topics like health, money, law, safety, or travel, always verify critical details before acting.

chat.welcome: Hi, I am Cafa AI. Ask me anything or start with a task.
chat.prompt.quick1: Draft a strategic memo for national AI adoption in education.
chat.prompt.quick2: Summarize top risks in government chatbot deployment.
chat.prompt.quick3: Generate image of a modern smart city command center at sunset.
chat.prompt.image1: Generate image of a futuristic government operations center.
chat.prompt.image2: Generate image of an underwater research city with glowing coral.
chat.prompt.image3: Generate image of a cinematic aerial view of a neon megacity.
chat.prompt.image4: Generate image of a modern courtroom with holographic evidence displays.
chat.prompt.video1: Generate video of drones coordinating disaster relief over a coastal city.
chat.prompt.video2: Generate video of a smart city skyline transitioning from sunset to neon night.
chat.prompt.video3: Generate video of a national emergency war room during a cyber incident.
chat.prompt.video4: Generate video of a futuristic parliament session with transparent voting screens.
